headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 36 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 36 airports right now. No engine anti-ice operations are currently flagged. Across base airports: 14 critical, 10 high, 7 medium, 8 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR); plus 21 other bases. 7 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, low cloud base and mist  — most notably around Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ) and Larnaca (LCA/LCLK). Network hotspots: Palanga (PLQ/EYPA), Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ), Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Larnaca (LCA/LCLK), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) and 31 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, snow / blowing snow and mist. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 36 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — CRIT: fog; snow; visibility down to 300 m, RVR down to 750 m, cloud base around 100 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 400 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 300 m, RVR down to 400 m, cloud base around 100 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 150 m, RVR down to 325 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — CRIT: mist; snow; strong gusts risk and 18 others. Worst affected now: Palanga (PLQ/EYPA) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; crosswind limitation risk (drivers: approach minima limits, crosswind limitations, cold-temperature performance penalties) | Venice Marco Polo (VCE/LIPZ) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 100 m, RVR down to 225 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below alternate minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 150 m, RVR down to 325 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Larnaca (LCA/LCLK) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; visibility down to 2 km (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) | Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB) — CRIT: snow; visibility down to 2.5 km, cloud base around 400 ft (drivers: low ceilings, snow/blowing snow) | Frankfurt-Hahn (HHN/EDFH) — CRIT: snow; crosswind limitation risk; strong gusts risk (drivers: crosswind limitations, low ceilings, thunderstorm/convective risk) and 30 others.
